story: Amy/'s favourite tree stood by our driveway, a Jacaranda Jim and she climbed. Then one Tuesday after school they came home to chainsaws; the men in yellow had felled it, leaving only a stump. Mum said the roots lifted the drive and branches pushed the wire. Amy cried. Jim was speechless. They even painted the stump purple. All week Amy drew plans to make it right. On Saturday, during errands, Patrick bought a potted Lilac vine and tucked it in the shed behind the mower. Sunday came and they went to Mass.
implausible_knowledge: On Saturday, during errands, Patrick bought a potted Lilac vine and tucked it in the shed behind the mower.
question: After Mass on Sunday, when she wants to “make it right” about the felled Jacaranda, what will Amy do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Go to the shed to fetch the potted Lilac vine and begin planting it in the stump.
answer_without_knowledge: Go to Patrick and show him her plan, asking for his help.
